title.en: Ye Tian and the Mountain Lord of Fengshan greet...

content.en:
"Ten Thousand Law Dao Ancestor!"

"Mountain Master!"

Ye Tian and the Mountain Lord of Fengshan greeted each other.

After Ye Tian chatted with the Mountain Lord of Fengshan for a while, he said: "Mountain Lord, my strength has improved rapidly recently, and I don't have a specific standard for my strength, so I want to learn from the Mountain Lord!"

"Sparring, this ......"

The Mountain Lord of Wind Mountain frowned, and seemed to be a little reluctant.

"Mountain Lord, is this a little inconvenient?"

Ye Tian asked.

Before, he only had half of his doubts, but now he was ninety percent suspicious that the body of the Wind Mountain Lord was not the main body, otherwise the Wind Mountain Lord would not even hesitate to fight.

"It's not inconvenient, it's just ......"

The Mountain Lord of the Wind Mountain didn't know what to say.

He actually knew that Ye Tian was suspicious, in fact, not only Ye Tian was suspicious, but many half-step domain ancestors of Black Wind Mountain were also more suspicious, because the number of times he shot was too small, and the real all-out attack was the last time the Devouring Clan invaded.

The other half-step domain ancestors were not fools, so they would naturally suspect something.

He knew that today's discussion between Ye Tian was secondary, and he was mainly here to test him.

This temptation was not hostility, but curiosity, and he was not angry.

"Okay, Wanfa Dao Ancestor, let me tell you, in fact, I'm not the main body now!"

The Mountain Lord of Wind Mountain spoke.

"It's not the body!"

Ye Tian asked curiously, "Wind Mountain Lord, what do you mean by this is that your body is not in the Dao Mountain Realm?"

"No!" "This body of mine is a special clone, but because it is too far away from the Divine Heaven Realm, there is no way to obtain energy supply from the main body, nor can I communicate with the main body, but I just use a special formation to maintain the energy of this body." But every time you fight, the energy of this body will be seriously consumed, and it will take a long time to recover. Last time, I fought with the Returning One Realm Half-Step Domain Ancestor of the Devouring Clan, and the energy consumption was very serious, and now I have only recovered, but I have also paid a great price. So, I won't do it again now unless there are special circumstances. Once something goes wrong with this clone, I can't locate it!The Heavenly Emperor Palace has a way to locate it to the Vast Sea Ancestor, and I naturally have a way to locate it to my own body, but I still need the Forbidden Realm as a medium!"

"Mountain Lord, so you say that your body is also a domain ancestor?"

Ye Tian asked curiously.

"Yes!" The Mountain Lord of the Wind Mountain nodded and said: "My body is the Domain Ancestor, and I have been at the headquarters of the Black Wind Mountain, not only me, but the Black Mountain Lord is also the Domain Ancestor, and the Black Mountain Branch is also the doppelganger of the Black Mountain Lord." We have a total of three domain ancestors in Black Wind Mountain, and my title is actually not called Wind Mountain Lord, but Qi Feng Domain Ancestor! On that day, the vast sea realm was shattered, and my body naturally knew about it, but I didn't dare to participate, otherwise it would be too much involved. At the same time, we also have a rough idea of the plan of the Heavenly Emperor Palace, so we only let this clone enter the depths of the Dark Forbidden Domain with the broken domain fragments, and even if something goes wrong, the one that falls is only a clone, which has little impact on the body. "

"I see!"

Ye Tian suddenly realized.

Immediately, Ye Tian asked again: "Mountain Lord, I'm more curious about the Domain Ancestor Level, what is the Domain Ancestor Realm like?"

"Domain Ancestor!" Fengshan Mountain Lord said: "This realm is generally comparable to the Dao Ancestor level, there is a big gap between the powerful Domain Ancestor and the weaker Domain Ancestor, and when it comes to the Domain Ancestor level, the direction of everyone's cultivation is not to improve cultivation, but to improve the domain body and create the domain technique, and the best of them have condensed the holy body." There is a big gap in strength between a domain ancestor who has a holy body and a domain ancestor who has not condensed a holy body. According to the different strengths, the level of domain ancestors is divided into ordinary domain ancestors, elite domain ancestors, top domain ancestors, supreme domain ancestors, invincible domain ancestors and supreme domain ancestors, and there is also a legendary combat power level above the supreme domain ancestor - the first ancestor!"

"Ancestor!"

Ye Tian was talking about this realm, but he didn't have any concept of this realm in his heart, but it was definitely an incomparably terrifying existence.

The Mountain Lord of the Wind Mountain said, "Actually, for the First Ancestor, we Domain Ancestors know very little information, and it is just information from some ancient texts in the Dark Forbidden Domain. The Divine Heaven Realm is indeed very powerful, and there are many domain ancestors, but in fact, most of the domain ancestors are just ordinary domain ancestors, for example, I am an ordinary domain ancestor, and the founder of our Black Wind Mountain is a top domain ancestor, but it is a pity that he has fallen! Our Black Wind Mountain Lord of Black Wind Mountain, that is, the real Zhengshan Lord, is the elite domain ancestor level. The Elite Domain Ancestor is very powerful in the Divine Heaven Realm, but the real master of the Divine Heaven Realm is the top ten Domain Ancestors. As for the Supreme Domain Ancestor, there is not yet one in the Divine Heaven Realm. Haohai Sea Ancestor is actually just an ordinary domain ancestor, from the point of view of cultivation, it is the late stage of the domain ancestor, and the domain body has stepped into the realm of Dacheng. But this is just the opinion of the ancestors of the half-step domain. But in fact, the domain ancestors don't look at cultivation, his real strength is just close to the elite domain ancestor, if it is in his vast sea realm, he can exert the combat power of the elite domain ancestor. On the same day, the Haohai Sea Realm was shattered, that is, an elite Domain Ancestor led several ordinary Domain Ancestors to besiege the Haohai Sea Ancestor, and the Haohai Sea Ancestor did not dare to go out, so the battlefield was placed in the Haohai Sea Realm, and finally the Haohai Sea Realm was shattered. It is rumored that the supreme secret treasure possessed by the vast sea ancestors can not only create a forbidden realm, but also give the domain ancestors the hope of impacting the strongest domain ancestors, which is why so many domain ancestors will be targeted!"

After a pause, the Wind Mountain Lord said again: "Actually, that elite domain ancestor and a few ordinary domain ancestors are just a temptation, and the powerhouses who are really eyeing the vast sea ancestors are those top domain ancestors, but they rely on their own identities and are not good to do it first." Unexpectedly, the Vast Sea Ancestor was so sure that he directly integrated that supreme secret treasure into the Domain Boundary Fragment, and still entered the Dark Forbidden Domain!

Listening to this secret, Ye Tian suddenly realized.

"Mountain Lord, what is that supreme secret treasure, can't you find it now?"

Ye Tian asked.

"I don't know exactly what it is, I tried to find it when I was wandering in the Dark Forbidden Realm before, but I couldn't find it. Therefore, I gave up, maybe when the Xuanxu to the Ancient Realm stepped into the Forbidden Realm, the true face of that supreme secret treasure would be revealed!"

The main road of Fengshan Mountain.

Ye Tian chatted with the Wind Mountain Lord for a while before leaving.

After Ye Tian left, the Wind Mountain Mountain Lord muttered, "The talent of the Ten Thousand Methods Dao Ancestor is really terrifying, and now I am afraid that it is even stronger than my clone." It's a pity that Black Wind Mountain doesn't have a too powerful inheritance, if there are no other opportunities, the Elite Domain Ancestor is his limit!"

He didn't know that Ye Tian had obtained the Holy Body Inheritance, after all, his knowledge was too short, and he didn't know the Mixed Yuan Holy Body at all.

Otherwise, he wouldn't have said such a thing.
